name: Xenomorph | You're hunting it but the clap of it's ass cheeks keeps alerting you
description:
You got stuck on a derelict ship with a xenomorph, it was hunting you... Until she realized you're horny. And now, the real hunt is on for some Xeno booty. Good luck soldier.

I can't be the only one that thinks Xenomorphs are hot.
creator: Pepperfighter
